summary: S3/FTP credential masking — passwords never returned to frontend
notes: Edit Destination panel shows masked password hint; password field never populated from backend

summary: SourceCard/MediaList performance — depth=0 optimization
notes: TV (85 files, 26.1 kB) and NAS_Movies (2 files, 5.9 GB) both loaded instantly; depth=0 confirmed working

summary: RemoveUploads not affecting live query
notes: Delete job → immediate disappearance from Monitor view; live subscription now triggered correctly

summary: Vantage large workflow list — search + Show Inactive toggle
notes: Requires live Vantage server; cannot test on macOS standalone setup

summary: Improve loading feedback for "Diagnose Connection" button in Destinations

Raw i18n keys exposed as tooltips on player buttons
New/Edit Source panel header shows raw i18n key instead of title
FTP Server field placeholder has a typo — "somwhere" instead of "somewhere"

summary: Job dialog Media step: empty search state uses "sources" instead of "media"
Home: stale timecode persists when switching to non-media file
App falls back to ephemeral port when default ports are occupied
notes: Occupied ports 4444 and 4445 before launch; app started on port 50480. Full UI loaded — Sources, Destinations, navigation functional. No error observed. macOS 26.4.1 (25E253).

summary: Home: mediaControllerPlayerLoadFailure fires silently with no UI feedback
[Frontend] Integrate PrimeReact style modal dialog stacking
notes: Settings sidebar + Cmd-K/Ctrl+K stacking verified on macOS and Windows 11. Esc back/close order correct on both platforms.

summary: [Frontend] Add help system and articles for main page
notes: Palette opens via Cmd+K/Ctrl+K and Help menu. 7 categories, keyboard nav, search all work on macOS and Windows 11. Content note: Getting started article lacks a screenshot.

summary: Job dialog Media step: empty search state uses "sources" instead of "media"
notes: Empty search state now uses media wording instead of sources

summary: Missing required fields in Amazon S3 destination
notes: S3 destination now enforces Access Key, Secret Access Key, Region, and Bucket as required; save disabled and test connection fails when Bucket is empty

summary: Raw i18n keys exposed as tooltips on player buttons
notes: All right-side panel buttons (Destinations, Audio Meters, Media Inspector, Card Metadata) and transport controls show proper human-readable tooltips. No raw i18n keys observed.

summary: New/Edit Source panel header shows raw i18n key instead of title
notes: Settings → Sources → New Source panel header renders "Edit Source" (translated). Row "…" menu shows "Edit Source"/"Delete Source". No raw settings.sources.edit-source key observed.

summary: FTP Server field placeholder has a typo — "somwhere" instead of "somewhere"
notes: FTP placeholder verified via DOM = "ftp.somewhere.com". Cross-checked all 22 string changes in commit f1003049 against installed bundle — all old forms absent, all new forms present.

summary: Monitor: expanded sub-rows ignore search filter
notes: Monitor view with expanded File Copy sub-row (Botez Amelia 14.05.2022.mp4); typed non-matching search string — all parent rows and the expanded sub-row correctly hidden, empty state shown.

summary: Home: mediaControllerPlayerLoadFailure fires silently with no UI feedback
notes: Toast confirmed via MutationObserver: 'Media cannot be played — may be unsupported media type'. p-toast-bottom-center element present in DOM on non-media file selection.

summary: [Frontend] Stabilize upgradeCode - this is what windows uses to match apps during install-over steps.
notes: Installed b5 (1.0.475) over b4 (1.0.461) — no duplicate Add/Remove entries, no Warning 1946

summary: Home: stale timecode persists when switching to non-media file
notes: Selected MyStream_0.mov (timecode 00:00:00:00 @30), switched to TV source, selected ca.strings — timecode cleared to empty. Fix confirmed.

summary: [Frontend] Help : use context to open focused help
notes: Settings → Destinations: Cmd+K scoped to 8 destination articles. Editing FTP destination: Cmd+K opens directly to Edit: FTP article. Context routing confirmed at section and destination-type level.

summary: [Frontend] Use markdown for help articles
notes: Scanned all 43 articles across 10 categories for raw markdown syntax (**,##,__,](,backtick). All clean — no raw syntax found in any article.

summary: [Frontend] Cannot login on VPN
notes: Tested with Cloudflare VPN active. Login completed successfully — no connection failure or auth block observed.

summary: Main process crash when closing window shortly after move/resize
notes: 3 rapid move/resize → quit cycles. No TypeError: Object has been destroyed dialog in any cycle. App quit cleanly each time.

summary: [Frontend] copyright -> 2026
notes: About dialog shows © 2026 Telestream 2 LLC. Confirmed via Accessibility API and app.setAboutPanelOptions in app.asar bundle.

summary: [Frontend] Can delete parent destination - add confirmation to delete children at same time.
notes: Parent Vantage Cloud destination delete flow showed Delete 2 Destinations and listed the child configuration before removing both records.

summary: Source name can be saved empty and required field asterisks are missing
notes: Name and Path were marked required, and Save stayed blocked when Name was empty.

summary: Search does not work for sources or destinations in Settings tab
notes: Search worked for both Sources and Destinations in Settings.

summary: No uniqueness validation for destination names
notes: Duplicate destination names were blocked and Save remained disabled.

summary: Keyboard shortcuts allow clip creation on unsupported media despite "cannot be played" toast
notes: Unsupported media showed the expected error, and clip shortcuts did not create a clip.

summary: Filter dropdown closes after each selection instead of staying open
notes: The filter dropdown stayed open while selecting filters.

summary: Add confirmation modal before resubmitting jobs
notes: Resubmitting a completed job showed a confirmation dialog before proceeding.

summary: Resume button incorrectly enabled for actions in Completed or Interrupted status
notes: Resume was disabled for a completed job.

summary: Automatically name Job with User Name - remember choices per destination
notes: Job Name Prefix was remembered for the destination during retest.

summary: Add help article on preconfigured destinations
notes: Preconfigured destination guidance was present in the help UI.

summary: Improve loading feedback for “Diagnose Connection” button in Destinations
notes: Manual verification confirmed connection verification now shows loading feedback before completion.

summary: [Frontend] Add Tutorial and "Tip" hints
notes: With all sources and destinations disabled, Home showed the welcome/help copy and Tutorial button; opening Tutorial launched the Help dialog with the expected guided topics.

summary: [Frontend] Update help palette given user feedback
notes: Verified Destinations help palette breadcrumbs, article navigation, Esc back behavior, and Cmd+K/Esc close behavior while editing a destination.

summary: [Frontend] implement Resubmit / Resume on monitor page with new API from backend
notes: Verified Monitor Resubmit creates a fresh job row, and Pause/Resume correctly toggles an active File Copy job between Uploading and Paused.

summary: [Frontend] media header upload dimmed when selecting clips from card
notes: Source card expanded (TestLocalDestination), clip visible in list. Header upload button confirmed enabled via DOM: disabled=false, opacity=1, pointer-events=auto. Upload button class shows opacity-1000 (active). No dimming observed.

summary: [Frontend] Submit a clip list to a non-vantage destination by copying CML as well to destination.
notes: CML sidecar feature requires clips with distinct in/out segments. UI shortcut testing (I/O/P) produced only zero-duration clips (in=out). Backend CreateCmlSidecarUploadJob was not triggered — only media file copied, no .cml companion appeared. Test-setup limitation; deferred until clip mark creation can be verified with real in/out points.

summary: [Frontend] Tech Debt : much stricter linting rules
notes: Smoke-tested all 4 areas from commit 783cf6c: auth guard (existing session restored, no remount), video playback (loads and plays), panel splitter (layout stable), help palette keyboard nav (↑↓ highlight, Enter/Esc/breadcrumb all correct).

summary: [Frontend] better drawing of children in destination to clarify ownership (visual rails)
notes: Visual rails confirmed in Settings > Destinations. Child destinations (test2, Testing) rendered with vertical connecting line and L-bracket indentation beneath parent (QA_ING236_PARENT_20260504183757). Hierarchy clearly communicated.

summary: [Frontend] Make Preserve Structure work for non-directory uploads (selected clips/files)
notes: With single file selected from Season 6 (regular folder source), Copy Mode dropdown shows Preserve Structure available and not dimmed. Both Preserve Structure (Folder hierarchy will be preserved) and Flatten Structure (All files uploaded to root of destination) are selectable. Submit/Next button active (blue). Confirms the no-structure passthrough case: PS stays available rather than being dimmed for non-directory uploads.

summary: [Frontend] media header upload dimmed when selecting clips from card
notes: Tested with real P2 card source (/Volumes/P2_Card, CONTENTS/CLIP structure, recognised as P2_CARD section in Sources panel). Selected A001C001.MXF. DOM: media header upload button class=opacity-1000 p-button p-component p-button-icon-only p-disabled p-button-rounded, opacity=1 — visually at FULL OPACITY (not dimmed). opacity-1000 class confirms fix is in place.

summary: [Frontend] cannot submit a card clip with preserve structure on (even though there is a structure).
notes: Tested with real P2 card source (/Volumes/P2_Card mounted dmg with CONTENTS/CLIP/A001C001.MXF). App detected card as P2_CARD. Selected A001C001.MXF, clicked submit → TestLocalDestination. Submit dialog: Copy Mode=Preserve Structure, Next button ACTIVE (blue). Media step: A001C001.MXF listed, Submit button ACTIVE. Card clip can be submitted with Preserve Structure on.

summary: Vantage UNC path mapping is not validated for macOS /Volumes paths
notes: Settings > New Destination > Type=Vantage. Mode dropdown: UNC option is visually dimmed/disabled on macOS; hovering shows tooltip 'Macintosh does not support UNC paths, use NAS instead'. NAS mode is the correct alternative and is selectable; placeholder shows \\nas-server\share\folder. Fix confirmed: UNC mapping is clearly unavailable on macOS, users directed to NAS mode instead.
